canonical_definition: A multi-domain Chinese question-answering benchmark for assessing localized, vertical-domain knowledge in LLMs, comprising over 17,000 questions from 24 Chinese professional qualification exams across six domains.
papers: CARFT: BoostingLLMReasoning via Contrastive Learning with Annotated Chain-of-Thought-based Reinforced Fine-Tuning
